data.title: EastGroup Properties Announces 185th Consecutive Quarterly Cash Dividend
data.description: In Jackson, Mississippi, on March 6, 2026, EastGroup Properties, Inc. (NYSE: EGP) revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $1.55 per share. The dividend is set to be paid out on April 15, 2026, to shareholders holding Common Stock as of the designated record date.

data.title: Modest job growth, signs of future hiring intent highlight latest tech employment data, CompTIA analysis reveals
data.description: In Downers Grove, Illinois, on March 6, 2026, there was a slight increase in technology employment in February. Employers in both the tech sector and the overall U.S. economy hired more workers during this period, as per CompTIA, a key global vendor-neutral information provider. This growth signifies a positive trend in job creation, benefitting both the tech industry and the economy at large.

data.title: Gold Miners Are The Biggest Losers Of The Iran War — Here's The Hidden Reason
data.description: The recent war in Iran has had a significant impact on gold mining stocks, surprising many investors. The VanEck Gold Miners ETF (NYSE: GDX) experienced a sharp decline of around 10% in just two days of trading, despite the historical trend of conflict driving investors towards gold as a safe haven. Gold itself has remained relatively stable, trading at approximately $5,100 per ounce. This unexpected shift is attributed to the gold-to-oil ratio, a key profitability metric for gold mining operations. Prior to the military operation in Iran, gold miners were the top-performing equity industry, with GDX ETF soaring about 170% in the past year, fueled by a gold bull market that saw prices surpass $5,000 per ounce. The gold-to-oil ratio also saw a notable increase in that period. The full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Confidant of Nigel Farage loses $550K on Iran strike bet on Polymarket amid increasing attention on prediction markets.
data.description: A Polymarket account linked to George Cottrell placed numerous geopolitical wagers, as prediction markets face increasing attention.

data.description: The economic advisers of the president are confident that any current economic challenges are temporary and are focused on promoting the president's agenda leading up to the midterm elections.

data.title: +$5,100 Gold is Making These Ounces in the Ground a Lot More Interesting
data.description: Lake Victoria Gold Ltd. on behalf of Equity-Insider.com announced on March 6, 2026, that several gold producers achieved remarkable free cash flow margins in the fourth quarter of 2025. During this period, the industry's average all-in sustaining costs ranged from $925 to $1,025 per ounce. Moreover, the realized prices for gold surpassed this cost range, resulting in substantial profits for these producers.

data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index plummeted by 700 points due to a spike in oil prices and a surprisingly poor jobs report. Nvidia also experienced a decline in its stock value.

data.title: Liquidia Analysts Boost Their Forecasts After Q4 Earnings
data.description: Liquidia Corp (NASDAQ: LQDA) announced its fourth-quarter results, revealing quarterly earnings of 15 cents per share. This fell short of the anticipated 17 cents per share according to analysts. However, the company reported quarterly sales of $92.021 million, surpassing the expected $83.634 million. CEO Dr. Roger Jeffs expressed optimism for the future, highlighting the rapid acceptance of YUTREPIA® in clinical settings. This product is considered one of the most successful specialty drug launches in the past five years across various therapeutic areas. The adoption of YUTREPIA® continues to expand in conditions such as PAH and PH-ILD.

data.title: Democrats criticize Trump for poor job report while Republicans defend, creating tension before midterms.
data.description: The numbers released fell below expectations and sparked tension between the two parties leading up to the upcoming midterm elections.

data.title: HomePlunge Unveils the Bella: A Compact, Affordable Cold Plunge Chiller for Every Home
data.description: A renowned brand known for its award-winning bathtub cold plunge products is introducing a new addition to its lineup. The latest chiller is smaller, quieter, and more convenient, set to be showcased at the HFA Show 2026 in San Diego. Originating from San Francisco, HomePlunge has launched its newest cold plunge chiller model, which is set to debut publicly at the event. This marks an exciting evolution of their product line, as the brand continues to innovate in the industry.

data.title: Enterprise Products Partners L.P. 2025 Letter to Investors Now Available
data.description: Enterprise Products Partners L.P. (NYSE: EPD) released its 2025 Letter to Investors, accessible on their website under the Investors tab, highlighting its position as a top publicly traded partnership. As a leading provider of midstream energy services in North America, the partnership caters to producers and consumers of natural gas, NGLs, crude oil, refined products, and petrochemicals. For more information, visit www.enterpriseproducts.com.
